agent-context.description: Elegant & Minimalist Task Management System designed for developer workflows, featuring a high-fidelity dark glassmorphic UI, responsive sidebar drawer, dynamic search filtering, and robust priority starring.

frontend.core: React (v18.2), Redux Toolkit (State Management), React Router Dom (v6.23)
frontend.styling: Tailwind CSS (v4.0) with custom HSL color-scheme theme, Lucide React icons
frontend.build-tool: Vite (v5.2), post-build SSG script (prerender.js) for static hosting compatibility

backend.security: JWT Token authentication passed via X-Authorization custom header

directory-structure.item: Root of workspace, contains backend and frontend subdirectories, sitemap, and agent guide
Express backend. index.js sets up CORS, MongoDB connections, and registers filter and tasks routes
Backend controller endpoints, authentication models, and task models
Static public assets, robots.txt, sitemap.xml, and llms.txt
Reusable UI controls: Header, Sidebar/Filters, Projects, Tasks List, Modals
Main routes: LandingPage, Login, SignUp, ResetPassword, ProfileSettings, Loading/Error
Redux store configurations, UserSlice, and TodoFilterSlice

feature.name: Authentication
feature.description: Secure login, signup, forgot password, and reset credentials. Uses localStorage to persist tokens.
feature.instructions: 1. Navigate to `/sign-up` to register a new user account. 2. Go to `/login` and submit verified credentials. 3. Authentication credentials are saved in localStorage under 'token' and 'user'.

feature.name: Task Creation & Management
feature.description: Full CRUD operations on tasks. Add descriptions, priority labels, and specific due dates.
feature.instructions: 1. Click "New Task" button on top-right of dashboard. 2. Provide title (required), description, priority tier, and due date. 3. Tasks are saved instantly to MongoDB and re-sync in the Redux store.

feature.name: Starred & Priority Filters
feature.description: Sort and view active, starred, today's schedule, or deleted items dynamically.
feature.instructions: 1. Click star icon on a task row to highlight it. 2. Switch filters on Left Sidebar to narrow tasks down to All, Starred, Today, or Deleted list. 3. Counts in the sidebar reflect live tab counters matching current active items.

feature.name: Interactive Profile Settings
feature.description: Review credentials, update user details, or change the secure login password.
feature.instructions: 1. Click user avatar in bottom sidebar (mobile) or top dropdown (desktop). 2. Edit fields. Discard or Save actions appear only when form inputs are modified.

command.desc: Run backend API server in dev mode
Compile frontend static routes for build & SSG
Deploy build files to hosting provider
